## Verification

- [ ] Formatting, linting, typing, import architecture, and tests pass.
- [ ] Coverage, fixture smoke, and e2e smoke checks pass or are covered by CI.
- [ ] Not applicable:

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated when setup, behavior, release, or agent usage changed.
- [ ] No secrets, session data, proxy details, private payloads, or runtime artifacts committed.
- [ ] No auto-apply, proposal/message generation, backend ranking, or unsafe collection guidance added.
- [ ] Live evidence, if any, is reported separately from fixture/local contract evidence.
